codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior VAL-CROSS-006 failure by moving backward-compat verification onto a browser-facing dashboard surface. Commit f6a31f8 adds a dedicated fixture route (/fixtures/legacy-compat), fixture leads that omit scoreBreakdown and EV data, and reuses real dashboard components (LeadsTable/LeadDrawer/ScoreBreakdownPopover). This now validates the intended UI behavior—legacy leads render without crashes and fallback messaging is present for both missing breakdown and missing EV factor—rather than relying on backend-only helper tests.

summary: PASS. I reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton, its handoff, and both relevant diffs (11537a1 and f6a31f8). This fix adequately resolves the original dashboard-surface backward-compat gap called out in the prior failure by introducing a browser-verifiable fixture page and exercising fallback UI paths for legacy leads missing EV/score-breakdown fields.
